baselines.claim_guardrail: raw_rollout is native baseline evidence; repaired/reranked are shared deterministic postprocessing evidence.
input_requirements: ligand seed or dataset-specific preprocessing as required by upstream code
baselines.observed_scope: 100 official public-test pockets; 1 candidate per pocket for raw_rollout, repaired, and reranked layers; unified RDKit/Vina/GNINA rescoring complete.
baselines.source: public implementation and/or official public sampling results
baselines.source_notes: Official repository includes sampling scripts and a ckpt directory reference; generated outputs must be adapted into generation_layers_test.json before claim use.

budget_contract.layer_contract: raw baseline output is adapted to raw_rollout; any repair or reranking must be separate layers

claim_guardrail: Public baselines are available for q1_public_full100_budget1 layer-separated comparison. raw_rollout rows are native baseline evidence; repaired/reranked rows are shared deterministic postprocessing evidence and must not be interpreted as native generation improvements.
